headline: How XOM Navigates Business Uncertainty Better Than Many Peers
summary: ExxonMobil's low 15.44% debt load helps it ride oil-price swings, fund acquisitions and reward shareholders.

headline: Oxford Industries Posts Mixed Q1 Results, Joins Oracle, Swarmer And Other Big Stocks Moving Lower In Thursday's Pre-Market Session
summary: US stock futures higher, Nasdaq futures up 300 points. Oxford Industries shares fell 6.6% after mixed Q1 results. Other stocks also down in pre-market.
